questions.question: List the six phases of the classical Waterfall Model. (2 marks)
Explain two advantages and two disadvantages of the Waterfall Model. (5 marks)
expectedPoints: Advantage 1: Simple and easy to understand and use due to its linear, rigid structure.
Advantage 2: Produces extensive documentation which is useful for maintenance and onboarding.
Disadvantage 1: Highly inflexible; difficult and expensive to make changes to requirements after the phase is signed off.
Disadvantage 2: High risk as working software is produced late; major flaws may only be discovered during testing.
